headline: Nike Stock's Terrible Performance Just Keeps Getting Worse. Is It Finally Time to Buy?
summary: The athletic footwear giant's shares are trading at a 12-year low, and the comeback timeline keeps getting pushed out.

headline: NIKE Inc’s (NKE) Troubles Continue As Shares Hit Fresh 52-Week Low
summary: NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) is one of the Best 52-Week Low Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 8, Wells Fargo downgraded NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) to Equal Weight from Overweight and lowered its price target from $55 to $45. This still reflects an upside of 6.4% from here on. Wells Fargo believes the company […]
